# AI or Die — Full LLM Reference
> Your AI team. Your infrastructure. Your control. We help you build it.

## Company Snapshot
- Name: AI or Die
- Website: https://aiordie.now
- Offices: Miami, FL and Seattle, WA
- Phone: (786) 998-9310
- Founder: Tomasz Wojewoda

## Service Model
AI or Die is not a managed service provider.

We deploy AI teams into client businesses, train client teams to run independently, and provide optional advisory support.

### Phase 1 — DEPLOY (one-time)
- Discovery and workflow assessment
- Custom agent architecture
- Deployment on client infrastructure
- Credential handoff and ownership transfer

### Phase 2 — TRAIN (included)
- Hands-on training sessions
- Runbook creation and walkthroughs
- AI first-line support training
- Operating model handoff to client team

### Phase 3 — ADVISE (optional monthly)
- Advisory hours for difficult issues
- Strategy sessions and expansion planning
- Escalation support when AI team cannot resolve a case

## Pricing
### Deployment (one-time)
- STARTER — $5,000
  - 1-2 agents
  - discovery, design, deployment, training, runbook
  - 5 post-deploy advisory hours included

- GROWTH — $10,000
  - 3-5 agents
  - everything in Starter
  - multi-agent workflows

- SCALE — $15,000-$20,000
  - 6-10 agents
  - full AI workforce design and deployment

- ENTERPRISE — Custom
  - 10+ agents

### Advisory (optional monthly)
- LIGHT — $1,500/month
  - 4 hours/month
  - monthly review + async support

- STANDARD — $2,500/month
  - 8 hours/month
  - strategy sessions + new agent design

- PRIORITY — $4,000/month
  - 16 hours/month
  - priority response + roadmapping

## Included in Every Deployment Tier
- Discovery call
- Custom agent design
- Deployment on client infrastructure
- Hands-on training
- Runbook
- AI agents trained for first-line support
- 5 hours post-deploy advisory

## Support Escalation
1. Ask your AI team (free)
2. Check your runbook (free)
3. Call AI or Die advisory (paid)

## Positioning
- Them: "Let us run your AI."
  Us: "We build it. You own it. You run it."
- Them: "Our platform hosts your agents."
  Us: "Your platform hosts your agents."
- Them: "Share your API keys with us."
  Us: "We never see your API keys."
- Them: "Cancel and lose everything."
  Us: "Cancel and keep everything."

## Comms and Tooling
Supported communication channels:
- Discord or Telegram (recommended)
- Slack (supported)

Clients pay providers directly for:
- 1Password
- LLM API keys
- Hosting
- Communication tools
